since_last: 45% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -0.08% · Gold -0.73% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 45% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.03%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.03%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.85%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.85%, TLN +7.09%, PLTR +1.98%, SPCX +1.81%, NOW +1.64%. Laggards: MU -3.94%, MRVL -2.98%, CRNC -2.39%, TER -2.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.81% at $173.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
